overall.description: A third-person game scene showing a cloaked character walking through a snowy mountain landscape at dusk. The character travels along a path beside a partially frozen river, with snow-covered pine trees and mountain peaks visible under a purple twilight sky with falling snow.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain trail alongside pine forest

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a snowy path with pine trees on the left and a snow-covered mountain peak visible ahead

entered.detail: tall snow-covered mountain with distinct peak visible in the distance
dense cluster of snow-covered pine trees lining the left side of the path
partially frozen river with snow-covered banks running parallel to the path
snow-covered trail with visible footprints and patches of exposed grass

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a snowy mountain trail during twilight, with a dense pine forest on the left and a frozen river visible to the right. Snow falls gently as the character moves toward a prominent snow-covered mountain peak in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside path with view of opposite bank

events.description: character turns right to follow the river path, shifting view from forward to riverside

agents.ego_description: turning right to follow the riverbank, with the camera panning to reveal the opposite shore

entered.detail: snow-covered pine trees on the opposite riverbank becoming visible as the view opens
large snow-covered rock formation emerging along the river's edge

segments.scene_description: The character turns right to follow the riverbank, revealing the opposite shore lined with pine trees. The mountain peak shifts to the left of the frame as the perspective changes to focus on the frozen river and rocky outcrops along the water's edge.

events.description: small wooden boat becomes visible on the snowy riverbank to the right

agents.ego_description: walking carefully along the snowy riverbank approaching a rocky area with a small beached boat

entered.detail: prominent snow-covered boulders and rocky cliff face along the river edge
small wooden boat or canoe resting on the snowy shore near the water

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the riverbank, approaching a rocky area where large snow-covered boulders line the shore. A small wooden boat becomes visible on the snowy bank as the character moves closer to the water's edge, with the frozen river reflecting the purple twilight sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a snowy mountain trail that gradually shifts focus from a distant peak to the detailed edge of a frozen river. It begins with the character walking past a dense pine forest toward a prominent snow-covered mountain in the distance under a purple twilight sky. As the character turns right to follow the riverbank, the mountain peak shifts to the left of the frame, opening up a view of the opposite shore and rocky outcrops along the water's edge. The scene then progresses along the shoreline toward an area of large snow-covered boulders, finally revealing a small wooden boat resting on the snowy bank beside the reflective, frozen river.
